subcategory: Canvas animation showcase with hover-reveal corner decorations
use_cases: Decorative animated graphics for hero sections on SaaS landing pages
Visual interest elements for tech product showcases
Loading state animations or transition effects
Background decorative elements with hover interactions
ai_summary: A reusable canvas animation component featuring a decorative corner frame that reveals on hover. The component renders multiple animation patterns on HTML5 canvas using easing functions like easeInOutCubic. Dark themed with monochrome white elements, subtle border transitions, and continuous animated graphics suitable for tech and SaaS products.
